summary: Crypto markets show bullish momentum with Bitcoin breaking $70,000 amid positive regulatory developments like SEC/CFTC token taxonomy and ETF approvals, boosted by US-Iran ceasefire sentiment. Gold faces bearish pressure from high PPI, all-time high stocks, and no rate cuts, pulling back toward $4,580–$4,620. Equities remain strong with Nasdaq targeting 25,200–25,500 and S&P toward 7,300.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Discusses critical level as potential trap or bull run, indicating uncertainty at key support/resistance.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: Classified as Digital Commodity by SEC/CFTC, ending regulation by enforcement and enabling institutional innovation.[1]

signals.reason: ETF products moving to final approval stages following new regulatory taxonomy.[1]

signals.reason: ETF filings advancing to final stages post-SEC/CFTC taxonomy ruling.[1]

signals.reason: Pulling back toward $4,580–$4,620 as risk appetite reduces safe-haven demand amid high stocks and no rate cuts.[3]
